title: HTML Tokenization, Tree Construction, goquery, and Parser Differentials · Failure Repair Bay
summary: A preserved Go crawl trace contains one plausible scope, URL, robots, transport, body, tokenizer, goquery, frontier, goroutine, Colly callback, report, security, or shutdown defect; identify the first broken invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in budgeted Go HTML tree adapter and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose streaming tokenizer or x/net/html tree from required context, memory, malformed-input behavior, and selector needs.
Construct goquery documents from admitted readers and preserve base, source, parser, and response identity outside selections.
Test implied elements, misnesting, tables, templates, foreign content, comments, duplicate attributes, and deep input.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Token Vs Tree
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go team handles case 9881 during a malformed HTML and parser differential clinic. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove tokenizer versus tree choice, goquery documents, malformed repair, browser differentials, and budgets; browser Go remains deterministic and free of native network, parser, filesystem, process, and host effects; then change one tokenizer, goquery, selector, domain constructor, record, link, frontier, or trap case and retain rejected evidence. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose streaming tokenizer or x/net/html tree from required context, memory, malformed-input behavior, and selector needs.

Inspect the Token Vs Tree trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Authorized site auditing and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Token Vs Tree.

For Authorized site auditing and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Token Vs Tree, keep Token Vs Tree connected to executable Go authorization, URL, robots, response, tree, frontier, goroutine, report, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.
